title: Login Issue
description: Customer reports inability to access the system after entering correct username and password repeatedly. The login page reloads without error message and prevents account access.

title: Payment Failure
description: Customer attempted to purchase a subscription plan but the payment process stopped during checkout. Transaction did not complete and no confirmation message was displayed.

title: Password Reset Request
description: Customer forgot account password and attempted to use reset option. Reset email was not received and user remains unable to regain access to account.

title: Dashboard Bug
description: Customer reports dashboard statistics showing incorrect numbers. Recently created tickets are not appearing in activity panel causing confusion about real ticket status.

title: Email Notification Error
description: Customer states that ticket update notifications are not arriving through email. Important replies from support agents are therefore being missed regularly.

title: Account Deactivation
description: Customer requested permanent account deactivation due to privacy concerns. User wants confirmation that all personal data and stored information will be removed safely.

title: Slow Page Loading
description: Customer experiences unusually slow loading when opening ticket pages. System takes several seconds to display information which interrupts normal support workflow.

title: Profile Update Problem
description: Customer attempted to update personal information including phone number and address. System shows success message but profile changes do not actually save.

title: Mobile App Crash
description: Customer reports that the mobile application crashes immediately after login attempt. App closes automatically without warning preventing any further access.

title: Feature Request
description: Customer suggested introducing dark mode interface for better usability during night time. This feature could improve visual comfort and modernize system appearance.
